audit_items.proof_trace: Memory allocated by audioreach_alloc_graph_pkt() at line 66 and stored in graph->graph is not freed when idr_alloc() fails at line 75. The error path at line 78 only calls kfree(graph) but omits kfree(graph->graph), causing a memory leak.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker can repeatedly trigger idr_alloc failures by exhausting the ID space, causing memory leaks with each failure that could lead to system memory exhaustion.
